pages.text: Coastal lineage of the Elf race. Stacks on top of the shared Elf traits. Amphibious but not water-dominant.$(br2)$(bold)Sea Lungs.$(/) Holds breath underwater for approximately 45 seconds before drowning begins. Resets at the surface.$(br2)$(bold)Tidewalker.$(/) Swim speed +40%.$(br2)$(bold)Sea-Kin.$(/) Counts as a member of the aquatic entity group. Drowned and guardians treat the player as one of their own.
